arts.ttl: Unai Emery Sets Clear Stance on Marco Asensio’s Future Ahead of PSG Loan Expiry
arts.sum: Aston Villa are gaining momentum ahead of their first-leg quarterfinal clash with Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League. On Wednesday, Unai Emery and his team played one of two matches before their trip to Paris next week. Villa made the journey to American Express Stadium to face Brighton & Hove Albion. arts.ttl: Real Madrid Plot Blockbuster Double Swoop Involving £50M-Rated Man Utd, PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain had its eye on Dean Huijsen last summer as part of a defensive overhaul, but the Spanish center-back ended up signing with AFC Bournemouth. If PSG makes another push for him, competition will be fierce. arts.ttl: Arsenal Willing to Drop £150M-Rated Barcelona, PSG Target Interest for Realistic Option
arts.sum: While there wasn’t much speculation about a move in January, reports suggest Paris Saint-Germain and other clubs could make a stronger push for Newcastle United’s Alexander Isak this summer. RMC Sport previously reported that PSG considered a swap deal involving Gonçalo Ramos, Randal Kolo Muani, and Marco Asensio to bring Isak to Paris. arts.ttl: Liverpool Ready to Pursue £50M-Rated PSG, Real Madrid Target as Van Dijk Successor
